_explanation.audit_log_table: Migration 011_audit_log.sql was NOT applied to Cloud SQL before this session. The table was missing entirely. writeAuditLog() in audit/writer.ts was calling INSERT into a non-existent table on every query — the error was caught silently and only recorded to telemetry. Applied migration during this session.

_root_cause: vector_search.ts SQL filters on `e.native_id` which does not exist in rag_embeddings schema. Every vector_search call throws PostgreSQL error 'column e.native_id does not exist', caught silently, returns warning bundle with 0 results and message 'Vector search unavailable: DB query failed'. LLM sees no chart data → marks all degree/cusp data [EXTERNAL_COMPUTATION_REQUIRED].
